title: Neon Requiem
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A data-courier with a cortical implant that lets her taste encrypted files must traffick a memory she never recorded—a dead CEO's final 47 seconds of consciousness—across a city where every corporation wants to swallow it and every memory is a weapon.
long_description: A data-courier with a cortical implant that lets her taste encrypted files must traffick a memory she never recorded—a dead CEO's final 47 seconds of consciousness—across a city where every corporation wants to swallow it and every memory is a weapon.
